## Checklist

- [ ] Linked to an existing issue (e.g., `Closes #123`)
- [ ] `python scripts/run_all.py` executes all 5 phases without errors

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] Linear commit history maintained (no merge commits in branch)

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New functionality
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance, dependency update, internal refactor
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
